creator: oleg.pudeyev@gmail.com
text:
My /usr/src was newer than running system. I rebuilt and reinstalled
everything and the problem has gone away.

Thanks for your quick response.

Oleg

On Tue, Mar 9, 2010 at 9:45 AM, Larry Rosenman
<Larry.Rosenman@lombardi.com> wrote:

e

> 2)=A0=A0=A0=A0=A0 Does the /usr/src/sys match the running kernel?
